title: Dashboard Views
excerpt: It would be great if we could save Views in a Dashboard like we can on Boads.

posts.author: MichelleGugg (MichelleGugg)
posts.cookedHtml: It would be great if we could save Views in a Dashboard like we can on Boads.

posts.author: SMower (Seth Mower)
posts.cookedHtml: Seconding this - my agency manages 20 different facilities and it would be so incredibly useful if we had a “Main Dashboard” that included everything, and also have views dedicated to each individual facility. Right now I have to continually apply filters and it’s extremely tedious and time consuming.
